series_metadata.series_description: Record series includes all paper or digital application materials, to include nomination forms, application forms, non-disclosure agreements, and all supporting documents that are scanned or emailed and electronically stored in the shared drive for program administration purposes. Includes HLS 0210, HLS 0211, and HLS 0233.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: stored electronically ; Electronic: five (5) years
